title: Spain blocks prediction markets Polymarket, Kalshi over lack of gambling licence
author: thm
aiHeadline: Spain takes a stand against the future by banning prediction markets for not having a proper gambling license—because clearly, predicting the future is just like betting on horses.

title: GitHub Actions was down
author: cebert
aiHeadline: GitHub Actions goes down again, proving that even the best tools can fail when you need them most—because what could go wrong?

title: Netherlands blocks US takeover of vital digital supplier
author: vrganj
aiHeadline: Netherlands says 'no' to US takeover of vital digital supplier, proving that some countries still care about their digital sovereignty—unlike others who just hand over everything.

title: Motorola phones have started hijacking the Amazon app to insert affiliate codes
author: Cider9986
aiHeadline: Motorola phones are now your unwanted Amazon affiliates, hijacking your shopping experience to earn a quick buck—because who needs privacy when you can have affiliate codes?

title: Big tech's anti-labor playbook has come for Wikipedia
author: cdrnsf
aiHeadline: Big tech's anti-labor playbook comes to Wikipedia, proving that even a platform built on volunteerism isn't safe from corporate greed—because why have employees when you can have volunteers?
